analytics.last_inbound_snippet: If you like this video, please subscribe to my channel and give it a high rating. Thank you for watching.

cause_analysis.narrative: T Hair Beauty churned on 2026-02-12 after 178 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 86 times, but the client only replied 9. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
